codeReview.summary: All 7 security fixes properly implemented: (1) SHA-256 refresh token hashing via token-hash.ts used in register, login, refresh routes. (2) Auth hook returns after 401 send. (3) Timing-safe login uses DUMMY_HASH with bcrypt.compare for non-existent users. (4) Brand slug collision caught via P2002 error code → 409 response. (5) Swagger guarded behind NODE_ENV !== 'production'. (6) Refresh token rotation wrapped in prisma.$transaction for atomicity. (7) Password max 128 chars via .max(128) in shared auth schema. 6 new test cases added covering hashed tokens, slug collision, and password max length. Total test count: 21 API + 42 shared = 63 tests all passing.

summary: All 7 API security fixes correctly implemented with comprehensive test coverage. No blocking issues found.
